'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 89''' is the eighty-ninth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[November 7]], [[1979]].

This issue reprints the second of three parts of the story printed in the US as [[Star Wars (1977) 36|''Star Wars'' (1977) 36]].

Although it doesn't appear on the non-[[Star Wars]] [[Marvel Comics|Marvel UK]] little section of the cover, the ''Star-Lord'' comic will be replaced from now on by a ''Deathlok'' series.

==Contents==
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 1: A cold knight's frenzy"
*"Guardians of the galaxy! Part 16: Invasion of the reavers of Arcturus"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Forbidden planet!"
